$Comment: Void Golem combat theme. Auto-activates via EnvironmentIds condition on Env_Endgame_Void_Realm — plays throughout the Void Realm instance, stops on dimension leave. To swap the track: drop a custom .ogg at Common/Music/Endgame/Endgame_Golem_Void_Fight.ogg and change the Tracks entry to 'Music/Endgame/Endgame_Golem_Void_Fight.ogg'.
